records.description:
MANEUVER SUPPORT VESSEL (LIGHT) (MSV(L)).
THE GOVERNMENT IS ANTICIPATING A FOUR YEAR EMD PHASE, FOLLOWED BY A SIX YEAR PRODUCTION PHASE INCLUDING LRIP AND FRP.  THE MAJOR DELIVERABLES IN EACH PHASE ARE THE VESSELS.  THE ANTICIPATED QUANTITIES ARE, EMD, 1 MSV(L) PROTOTYPE, LRIP, 4 MSV(L), AND FRP, 32 MSV(L).
